docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,100.00 FILED BY JIMENEZ, FABIAN AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, CINDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED FEB-21-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, CINDY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR. 03, 2019. APPEARANCE: PLAINTIFF PRESENT WITH SPANISH INTERPRETER JEAN GARASCIA #301350, AND DEFENDANT PRESENT WITH SPANISH INTERPRETER ANDREA POLLOCK #301700, PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ, FABIAN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ, FABIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, CINDY $600.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
